stage_description: TODO (Plan 1 placeholder): scientifically-backed description of the senior stage (size-dependent: Toy/Small 11+ years, Medium 9+, Large 7+, Giant 5+). Text will be replaced in Plan 2.
nutrition: TODO: senior dog food, increased protein with preserved kidney function, joint supplements.
activity: TODO: gentle walks, swimming, avoid jumping from heights. Maintain muscle mass.
veterinary_check_frequency: TODO: exams every 6 months, blood chemistry, urinalysis, blood pressure monitoring. Source: AAHA 2019.
dental_care: TODO: regular dental evaluation — periodontal disease is particularly common at this stage.
warning_signs: TODO: disorientation, tremors, changes in toileting habits, hearing or vision loss, signs of pain.
disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and does not replace consultation with a veterinarian.
